summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Territory Atlas iteration 5 - Win Zones heatmap feature. All backend APIs (13/13 tests passed). All frontend features working correctly: simplified upload (2 types), Win Zones heatmap overlay, legend, hover tooltip with Win %, click popup with nearest point distance, layer toggles, map style toggle, point markers, clustering, and radius circles.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ returns welcome message (PASS)
Backend: GET /api/data/point returns point data with legacy fallback (PASS)
Backend: GET /api/data/city legacy endpoint works (PASS)
Backend: GET /api/data/density returns merged density data (PASS)
Backend: GET /api/data/county legacy endpoint works (PASS)
Backend: GET /api/data/wheat legacy endpoint works (PASS)
Backend: GET /api/analytics/top-zones returns aggregated top states (PASS)
Backend: Analytics with point layer filter works (PASS)
Backend: Analytics with density layer filter works (PASS)
Backend: Data integrity - both point and density datasets have records (PASS)
Backend: Density data has merged layers from county + wheat (PASS)
Backend: POST /api/upload/point endpoint exists (PASS)
Backend: POST /api/upload/density endpoint exists (PASS)
Frontend: File type selector shows only 2 options - Point Data and Density Data (PASS)
Frontend: Upload button label changes based on selected type (PASS)
Frontend: All 8 layers load on page init (Feed Mills, Hog Producers, Grain Fumigation, Customers, 1000-plus Acre Growers, Growers with On Farm Storage, Grain Retail Handlers, Acres) (PASS)
Frontend: Layer toggles work - toggling Acres OFF removes purple choropleth (PASS)
Frontend: Density layers show per-layer colors (PASS)
Frontend: Win Zones toggle appears in sidebar below layer groups (PASS)
Frontend: Enabling Win Zones shows red/orange/yellow heatmap overlay on counties (PASS)
Frontend: Win Zones legend appears at bottom-left when enabled (PASS)
Frontend: Hover tooltip shows Win % and nearest point distance when Win Zones enabled (PASS)
Frontend: Click popup on county shows nearest point distance and win score when Win Zones enabled (PASS)
Frontend: Disabling Win Zones removes the heatmap overlay and legend (PASS)
Frontend: Point markers with clustering visible (numbered clusters) (PASS)
Frontend: Radius circles toggle works (25mi/50mi/100mi options) (PASS)
Frontend: Map style toggle works (Satellite/Street) (PASS)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all Win Zones and simplified upload features verified)

test_credentials: No authentication required. Mapbox token configured in .env
seed_data_creation: Data already loaded in MongoDB from previous session - point data (city records), density data (merged county + wheat with 3789 records)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Win Zones heatmap feature fully working. Key implementation: win_score = density_score × (1 - coverage_score), where coverage uses inverse-distance to nearest radius-enabled point markers. Hot counties (red/orange) = high density + far from existing points. Key data-testids: file-type-selector, file-type-point, file-type-density, upload-file-button, win-zones-toggle, win-zones-legend, hover-tooltip, map-popup, map-style-toggle, layer-toggle-{name}, layer-item-{name}, radius-toggle-{name}.

simplified_upload.file_type_selector: Shows only 2 options: Point Data and Density Data
simplified_upload.upload_button_label: Changes dynamically based on selected type (Upload Point Data / Upload Density Data)
simplified_upload.density_upload_endpoint: POST /api/upload/density accepts County/State CSV and merges with existing

win_zones_heatmap.toggle: Win Zones toggle appears below layer groups when both point and density data exist
win_zones_heatmap.heatmap_overlay: Red/orange/yellow gradient overlay on counties based on win_score
win_zones_heatmap.legend: Win Zone Score legend appears at bottom-left with Low-High gradient
win_zones_heatmap.hover_tooltip: Shows Win % and nearest point distance (e.g., 'Win: 73% · 222mi to nearest')
win_zones_heatmap.click_popup: Shows county details with Nearest point distance and Win Score percentage
win_zones_heatmap.disable: Disabling Win Zones removes heatmap overlay and legend

layer_controls.all_layers_present: Feed Mills, Hog Producers, Grain Fumigation, Customers, 1000-plus Acre Growers, Growers with On Farm Storage, Grain Retail Handlers, Acres
layer_controls.layer_groups: Point Layers and Density Layers groups with collapsible sections
layer_controls.radius_toggle: Radius circles with 25mi/50mi/100mi options for Feed Mills, Grain Fumigation, Customers

map_interactions.county_choropleth: Per-layer density fills with independent colors
